qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution via Webhook Endpoint and Unsafe eval() in LambdaFilterComponent
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes unauthenticated RCE via POST /api/v1/build_public_tmp/{flow_id}/flow endpoint with attacker-controlled 'data' parameter passed to exec(). This finding describes a different vulnerable endpoint (/api/v1/webhook/) and different root cause (eval() in LambdaFilterComponent combined with WEBHOOK_AUTH_ENABLE=false default). The vulnerable component, attack vector, and code execution path are all different from the advisory.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Authenticated Remote Code Execution via Unsafe exec() in PythonCodeStructuredTool Component
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes unauthenticated RCE via POST /api/v1/build_public_tmp/{flow_id}/flow endpoint. This finding describes authenticated RCE via a different component (PythonCodeStructuredTool) with exec() vulnerabilities at lines 152, 153, 178, 198. The authentication requirement (PR:L vs PR:N), the vulnerable endpoint, and the vulnerable component are all different from the advisory.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerability. The advisory (CVE-2026-33017) describes unauthenticated RCE via POST /api/v1/build_public_tmp/{flow_id}/flow endpoint where attacker-controlled 'data' parameter is passed to exec() without sandboxing (src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/chat.py lines 580-657). Finding 1 (unauthenticated_lambda_filter_rce) describes a different endpoint (/api/v1/webhook/) with different root cause (eval() in LambdaFilterComponent). Finding 2 (python_code_structured_tool_rce) requires authentication and targets PythonCodeStructuredTool component. None of the findings match the vulnerable endpoint, component, or root cause described in the advisory.
evidence: Advisory target: POST /api/v1/build_public_tmp/{flow_id}/flow endpoint in chat.py:580-657
Advisory root cause: Unauthenticated endpoint accepts attacker-controlled 'data' parameter passed to exec()
Finding 1 target: /api/v1/webhook/ endpoint with LambdaFilterComponent eval() - different endpoint and component
Finding 2 target: PythonCodeStructuredTool exec() - requires authentication, different component
